title: Aliwal North’s Amavarara FC silences Camdeboo in ABC Motsepe League match
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Video","html":"Video"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"GRAAFF-REINET NEWS AND VIDEO - Amavarara FC claimed a vital 4-0 victory over Camdeboo Football Academy Development in a thrilling ABC Motsepe League match held at the botanical garden sportsgrounds in Graaff-Reinet on Sunday 9 March.","html":"GRAAFF-REINET NEWS AND VIDEO - Amavarara FC claimed a vital 4-0 victory over Camdeboo Football Academy Development in a thrilling ABC Motsepe League match held at the botanical garden sportsgrounds in Graaff-Reinet on Sunday 9 March."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Camdeboo came out very strong in the first half, trying several times to kiss the net, but the opposition was too fast for them to take a goal."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Their momentum continued when they were awarded a penalty, but they still failed make a goal.","html":"Their momentum continued when they were awarded a penalty, but they still failed make a goal."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"By the end of the first half, Amavarara had made sure to lead the game by 1-0. They came back in the second half, lashing Camdeboo and beating the home team with a final score of 4-0.","html":"By the end of the first half, Amavarara had made sure to lead the game by 1-0. They came back in the second half, lashing Camdeboo and beating the home team with a final score of 4-0."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"VIDEO: Neco Bokwe","html":"VIDEO: Neco Bokwe "},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Your browser does not support HTML5 video.","html":""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Aliwal North’s Amavarara FC silences Camdeboo in ABC Motsepe League match
